label: Gene symbol pack
description: Provides weighted lists of name symbols used when generating gene-named xenotype names.

prefixSymbols.label: Prefix symbols
prefixSymbols.description: Weighted symbols placed before the root in generated names.

suffixSymbols.label: Suffix symbols
suffixSymbols.description: Weighted symbols placed after the root in generated names.

wholeNameSymbols.label: Whole name symbols
wholeNameSymbols.description: Weighted symbols used as the entire generated name.
